Premium Interior & Exterior Painting Services

Transforming Residential and Commercial spaces in Edmonton and Calgary with professional precision and pride.

Book an Estimate View Our Work

Our Core Pillars

Comprehensive painting solutions tailored to the Canadian climate and your exacting standards.

Residential Interior

Precision detail for homes, from single rooms to full estate repaints. We protect your furnishings and leave flawlessly painted walls.

Residential Exterior

Durable, weather-resistant finishes tailored for the Canadian climate. Protecting and beautifying your home’s curb appeal.

Commercial Painting

Scalable solutions for offices, retail, and industrial spaces with minimal business disruption and rapid project turnaround.

Specialty Finishes

Professional surface preparation, high-end coating applications, cabinet refinishing, and custom decorative textures.

Dario B. Alcantara

Owner & Master Painter

Pride in Every Stroke.

At Filcan Pride Painting Ltd, our name reflects our heritage and our work ethic. We merge the hardworking spirit of the Filipino-Canadian community with uncompromising standards of quality and resilience.

Led by Dario B. Alcantara, our team treats every property—whether a cozy residential interior or an expansive commercial exterior—with the utmost respect. We don't just apply paint; we meticulously prepare surfaces, choose premium materials, and deliver a flawless finish that stands the test of time and weather.

  • Fully Licensed & Insured
  • Clear Communication & Pricing
  • Immaculate Cleanup & Respect for Property
